## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have self-reviewed my own code
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @workspace/fluxbuilder run build` passes
- [ ] I have added/updated tests if applicable
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My changes support dark mode (if UI change)
- [ ] My changes are accessible (keyboard navigation, ARIA labels)
- [ ] My changes work on mobile viewports (if UI change)
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, API keys, or credentials
